calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-18-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840
Petitioners Liuging Yang and Haile He; father and mother of minor present in court.
Petitioner Haile He sworn and examined through Court Appointed Certified Cantonese Interpreter Benjamin Giang.
Proof of Publication on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Haohe Yang to Terry Haohe Yang.
The Court also grants petition for Change of Name of Haili He/mother to Michelle Haili He.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.
